title: arif_observe (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `arif_observe`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing arifos schema for `arif_observe` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: A PETRONAS annual report is not just information — it is institutional self-symbolisation.

source_symbol_class.description: §3.C — Observation result must be classified by source symbol.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every arif_observe output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
